videos.title: "Coffee and a Cigarette" Inspired This Steak
videos.author: Bon Appétit
videos.description:
Chef Michael Vignola of The Eighty Six takes us inside the aging box to show off a stunning 107-day dry-aged American Wagyu with a coffee and tobacco crust.

videos.title: A Day Making NYC’s Most Viral Burritos | On The Line | Bon Appétit
videos.author: Bon Appétit
videos.description: Bon Appétit spends a day on the line with chef Annisha Garcia of Son Del North in New York City. The viral NYC burrito shop serves up to 10,000 burritos a week, with its internet-famous bean-and-cheese burrito putting it on the map. Inspired by her childhood in Tijuana and Northern Mexican grilling

videos.title: We Tried the Best Peking Duck in NYC | Street Eats | Bon Appétit
videos.author: Bon Appétit
videos.description: Bon Appétit meets chef Lucas Sin at NYC’s largest Chinatown in Flushing to eat the city’s most traditional Peking Duck. videos.title: How One of NYC’s Best Chefs Cooks Perfect Salmon in 10 Minutes | Made in House | Bon Appétit
videos.author: Bon Appétit
videos.description: Learn how to make perfectly crispy-skinned pan-seared salmon at home with chef Ed Szymanski in the Bon Appétit Test Kitchen. Learn how to choose the freshest salmon and master getting ultra-crispy skin without overcooking your fish. Served with a rich lemon caper brown butter sauce and Dijon spinach
